pi_items.source: Checked SuiteCRM's default Contacts listview definitions via GitHub source code. The fields DEPARTMENT and DO_NOT_CALL correspond exactly to the 'Department' and 'Do Not Call' UI columns and exist in the module metadata.
Checked SuiteCRM's default Contacts listview definitions via GitHub source code. The field TITLE corresponds to 'Title' and has 'default' => true by default.
Checked SuiteCRM's default Contacts listview definitions via GitHub source code. The field NAME corresponds to the Contact Name and is a default column.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying the default Contacts list view layout in SuiteCRM. By inspecting the SuiteCRM source code for Contacts listview definitions, it is verified that the target columns match the internal field keys 'DEPARTMENT' and 'DO_NOT_CALL' for addition, and 'TITLE' for removal. The 'NAME' field must be preserved as a default column.
